title: dalbergia glabra var. paucifoliolata
intro: Dalbergia glabra var. paucifoliolata, also known as a variety of the dalbergia glabra tree, is a type of plant belonging to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical forests in India and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia glabra var. paucifoliolata include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Dalbergia glabra var. paucifoliolata typically involve its leaves, bark, and roots, which are used to make teas, infusions, and ointments for various medicinal purposes.
